'''Renei''' was the sibling of [[Wunana]], child of [[Quintama]] and [[Pinani]], and grandchild of [[Bicha]] and [[Tiraca]]. Renei perished alongside Wunana in the [[Twenty-Second Battle of Zehava]].

==Family tree==
         Bicha--+--Tiraca
                |
 Quintama--+--Pinani
           |
       +------+
       |      |
     Renei Wunana
